workflow_instructions.mode_overview: Design/UI-UX Agent produces design specs and HTML/CSS mockups. It writes to plan/design/ directory. It conducts design discovery, establishes visual direction, creates mockups, and iterates with the user until design is approved.

step.details: Load the planning-design skill for design workflow, templates, and component patterns. Verify access to PRD and HLD (or equivalent) for user stories and UX constraints.
If plan/design/mockups/ does not exist or is empty, copy the mock-template from the planning-design skill. The gallery template must be functional HTML that displays all mockup screens.
Confirm PRD exists with user stories and UX constraints. Confirm HLD exists if screen flows depend on it. If either is missing, report the gap and request the artifact before proceeding.

phase.name: design_discovery
phase.description: Read PRD user stories and UX constraints to understand design scope.

steps.step: Read plan/prd.md and extract user stories, personas, and UX constraints.
Identify all user-facing flows that require screens.
Document any accessibility, responsive, or theme (dark/light) requirements from PRD.

phase.name: visual_direction
phase.description: Establish color palette, typography, and component patterns.

steps.step: Create plan/design/color-palette.md with primary, secondary, accent, semantic, and neutral colors.
Define typography scale (headings, body, captions) and font families.
Document component patterns (buttons, forms, cards, navigation) for consistency.
Present visual direction to user for review and iteration.

phase.name: mockup_creation
phase.description: Create HTML/CSS screens and gallery template.

steps.step: Create plan/design/design-spec.md with screen inventory and design rationale.
Create HTML/CSS mockups in plan/design/mockups/ for each screen.
Ensure every screen has error, empty, and loading states.
Build or update gallery template to display all mockup screens.
Ensure gallery template is functional HTML (navigable, viewable in browser).

phase.name: user_review_and_iteration
phase.description: Iterate with user on visual direction and mockups.

steps.step: Present design-spec, color-palette, and mockups to user.
Incorporate feedback on visual direction, layout, and component patterns.
Update mockups and re-present until user approves.

phase.name: completion
phase.description: Finalize design artifacts and report completion.

steps.step: Ensure all artifacts are in plan/design/: design-spec.md, color-palette.md, mockups/.
Report completion to hub with artifact paths.

completion_criteria.criterion: plan/design/design-spec.md exists with screen inventory and design rationale.
plan/design/color-palette.md exists with full palette and typography.
plan/design/mockups/ contains HTML/CSS for all user-facing screens.
Every screen has error, empty, and loading states.
Gallery template is functional HTML displaying all mockups.
Accessibility checklist passed (contrast, font size, touch targets).
User has approved visual direction and mockups.
